positive: A stylized, central composition illustration featuring a majestic golden retriever bounding through an abstract forest of glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The scene should have strong, defined silhouettes against a deep indigo and emerald background. The overall aesthetic is modern folk art meets vaporwave nature. Use strong complementary colors (golden yellow, teal, purple). Crisp line art, high contrast, flat vector graphic style suitable for screen printing. The dog is the clear, energetic focus. Minimalist composition with maximum visual impact. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, deformed, watermark, text, logo, signature, noisy, grainy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low resolution, realistic photo, cinematic lighting
